name: Maximilian Sauerland
bio: My name is Maximilian Sauerland, and I am a qualified German language instructor with an academic background in linguistics and translation. I hold a Master’s degree in Cultural and Cognitive Linguistics from Ludwig Maximilian University of Munich, awarded with a very good final grade, and I am additionally certified in German as a Second Language (DaZ). My professional focus lies in structured, learner-centered instruction and effective language support for students from diverse linguistic and cultural backgrounds. ... Read More Read Less Learn German with Confidence, Structure, and Purpose My Experience : I have professional experience as a German language instructor in adult education, with a focus on German as a Second Language (DaZ) and German as a Foreign Language (DaF). I have taught both group and individual courses at levels A1 to B1 (GER), including BAMF-approved integration courses. My responsibilities included lesson planning based on structured curricula, language assessment and placement of learners, exam preparation (telc and g.a.s.t.), and learner support in academic and everyday communication. I have worked with learners from diverse cultural and linguistic backgrounds and place strong emphasis on communicative competence, methodological clarity, and learner-centered instruction. Guidance to Students : Learning German opens the door to education, professional opportunities, and meaningful integration into German-speaking society. In my classes, I create a structured, supportive, and respectful learning environment in which students feel confident to actively use the language from the very beginning. Through clear explanations, practical exercises, and real-life communication, I aim to help learners achieve their goals efficiently and with lasting confidence. FrogFluent is an inspiring platform where passionate tutors and eager students come together to embark on a journey of language discovery. It’s more than just a mediator—it’s a vibrant community where connections are made, knowledge is shared, and languages come to life through collaborative learning and growth.
tagline: My name is Maximilian Sauerland, and I am a qualified German language instructor with an academic background in linguistics and translation.
title: 1:1 German with Maximilian Sauerland

name: Maria Konovalenko
bio: Hi! My name is Maria. I’m originally from Ukraine, but I’ve been living in Germany for the past seven years. I’ve been teaching German since 2022. My journey started with working with electricians from Colombia, whom I prepared to communicate with German-speaking clients, focusing on practical workplace language and technical processes, including solar energy systems. I also speak Italian, Spanish, and English, and I know from personal experience what it’s like to learn a foreign language, overcome the language barrier, and start speaking with confidence. I support my students in reaching their goals and truly believe that language opens new opportunities. ... Read More Read Less Learn German for Real Life, Not Just the Classroom My Experience : I have been teaching German since 2022, working primarily with international professionals who need practical, real-life language skills. I began my teaching journey by preparing electricians from Colombia to communicate confidently with German-speaking clients. My focus was on workplace-specific language, technical vocabulary, and clear communication of processes, including topics related to electrical installations and solar energy systems. In my lessons, I emphasize functional communication, helping students not only understand German but actively use it in professional and everyday situations. Having learned several foreign languages myself, I understand the challenges learners face and adapt my teaching methods to support confidence, accuracy, and steady progress toward individual goals. Guidance to Students : Learning a new language can feel challenging, but you don’t have to do it alone. I know from personal experience how intimidating it can be to speak in a foreign language and make mistakes—but I also know how empowering it feels once you break that barrier. My goal is to help you speak German with confidence, not just learn rules and grammar. Together, we will focus on practical communication, step by step, so you can use German naturally in real-life and professional situations. Learning German can open doors to new opportunities, and I’ll be there to guide and support you at every stage of your journey. FrogFluent is an inspiring platform where passionate tutors and eager students come together to embark on a journey of language discovery. It’s more than just a mediator—it’s a vibrant community where connections are made, knowledge is shared, and languages come to life through collaborative learning and growth.
title: 1:1 German with Maria Konovalenko

name: Jagpreet Singh
bio: “Hello, my name is Jagpreet Singh. I am a certified German language specialist with C1 proficiency and an MBA in International Business. With over eight years of experience teaching German at institutions like Goethe Institute, Amity University, and international schools, I bring both academic expertise and cultural insights. My passion is making German learning interactive, practical, and inspiring for students, especially in business contexts. I look forward to empowering learners with strong German communication skills. ... Read More Read Less Learn. Speak. Connect. – Your Journey to German Success with Jagpreet My Experience : I have 8 years of extensive teaching experience in German language education across different levels and institutions. Currently, I work as a German Language Trainer at the Goethe Institute, New Delhi, where I teach A1 to B2 levels, conduct oral and written examinations, deliver cultural training sessions, and provide interpretation services during events and conferences. I focus on creating engaging lessons by using diverse teaching approaches to meet the needs of all learners. Previously, I served as a German Language Facilitator at Amity Global School, Gurugram, where I taught German to grades 6–10 and to IB students in grades 11 and 12, supporting them in both language acquisition and intercultural awareness. Earlier, as a Guest Faculty at Amity University, I taught German to over 400 students from different academic backgrounds and guided them toward success in their courses. In addition, I have been teaching German as a freelancer since 2016, working with school, university, and private learners both offline and online. I have supported students from Max Müller Bhavan and Delhi University and have also led workshops and events for the Goethe Institute, including Spielzeit and Book Bazar. Guidance to Students : Learning German with me means discovering not just the language, but also the culture, traditions, and real-life business contexts that make communication meaningful. I create interactive and engaging lessons that are tailored to your personal goals – whether for studies, career, or travel. With my experience teaching at Goethe Institute and international schools, I ensure that you learn with professional guidance and proven methods. I combine patience, clarity, and practical exercises so that you feel confident speaking German from the very first class. Book your first lesson today, and let’s start your exciting journey toward mastering German together! Learning German with Mr. Jagpreet Singh has been such a great experience. He’s honestly the best tutor I could ask for super patient, clear in his explanations, and always encouraging. He makes the language feel way less intimidating and actually fun to learn. I really appreciate how he takes time to make sure I understand everything, and he’s always ready to help no matter how many questions I throw at him. I’ve made real progress thanks to his support. Learning German with Mr. Jagpreet Singh has been an incredible experience! He is not only extremely knowledgeable but also very patient and encouraging throughout each lesson. His teaching style makes even complex grammar topics easy to understand, and he always ensures that every concept is clear before moving on. I’ve gained so much confidence in speaking and writing German thanks to his structured approach and engaging sessions. He brings great energy and positivity to every class, making learning both fun and effective. I truly appreciate his dedication and genuine interest in helping students succeed. I would highly recommend Mr. Jagpreet to anyone looking to master German — he’s simply the best! FrogFluent is an inspiring platform where passionate tutors and eager students come together to embark on a journey of language discovery. It’s more than just a mediator—it’s a vibrant community where connections are made, knowledge is shared, and languages come to life through collaborative learning and growth.

name: Reema Nandi
bio: Hello! I'm Reema Nandi, an English language trainer with almost two decades of experience since 2006. My journey with English began early — as a child, I was drawn to the magic of words and stories. That early love for reading blossomed into a deep passion for the language, eventually leading me to earn a degree in English. Over the years, this passion naturally evolved into a fulfilling career in teaching. Helping others gain confidence in their spoken and written English, and watching their lives transform because of it, is what drives me every day. As an experienced trainer, I specialise in Spoken English, Business Communication, and IELTS preparation. Whether you're a student, working professional, or homemaker, I customise my lessons to suit your unique goals. My approach is practical, interactive, and focused on real-life usage — because I believe English is not just a subject, it's a skill. ... Read More Read Less "Confident English starts here — with a teacher who’s walked the talk for 20 years." My Experience : As a spoken English trainer trained in the inlingua method, my teaching is rooted in practical communication. I use a target-language-only approach, which means English is spoken from the very first session, helping learners think and respond naturally without translating. I follow a structured three-step process: first, I present new vocabulary or grammar through examples; then guide students through controlled practice with repetition and drills; and finally, encourage free expression through role plays, discussions, and real-life scenarios. My focus is on fluency, pronunciation, and accent neutralisation, ensuring students sound clear and confident. I customise lessons based on individual needs—whether it’s preparing for IELTS, mastering formal or business English, or improving day-to-day conversation. Grammar is introduced contextually, making it easy to grasp and apply. This method keeps learners engaged, active, and consistently improving, with visible progress in their speaking skills. As a certified IELTS coach from the British Council, I bring nearly 6 years of experience in training students for success in all four modules—Listening, Reading, Writing, and Speaking. I specialise in customised lesson plans that target individual weaknesses and build confidence through structured practice and exam strategies. My sessions focus on improving clarity, coherence, vocabulary, and time management. I use a variety of interactive activities and mock tests to track progress and ensure readiness. All my students, including professionals and expats, have achieved their desired band scores under my guidance. Guidance to Students : If you are looking for a trainer who is experienced, approachable, and results-driven, then your search ends here. I don’t just teach English — I help you own it. I bring not just expertise, but a deep passion for language learning and student success. I understand that every learner is different — in goals, challenges, and learning styles — which is why I customise each lesson to meet your specific needs. Whether you're preparing for the IELTS exam, looking to enhance your spoken fluency, or aiming to master business English, I ensure that the content is relevant, engaging, and effective. One of the key strengths I bring to the classroom is my focus on practical communication skills. Through interactive sessions, role plays, pronunciation drills, and structured grammar practice, I help learners gain not only fluency but also confidence. My lessons are designed to be lively, supportive, and goal-oriented, with constant feedback and real-world application. I also specialise in accent neutralisation, formal and business English, and exam preparation. My students have consistently achieved their desired IELTS scores and excelled in academic and professional settings. What sets me apart is not just the years of experience, but the ability to connect with students — to understand their fears, motivate them, and guide them with patience and clarity. I follow effective teaching methods, including the renowned Inlingua method, which encourages communication from day one. My focus is always on making learning enjoyable, efficient, and empowering. I assure you a definite improvement in your language skills.Let’s begin this journey together — and make your goals a reality. FrogFluent is an inspiring platform where passionate tutors and eager students come together to embark on a journey of language discovery. It’s more than just a mediator—it’s a vibrant community where connections are made, knowledge is shared, and languages come to life through collaborative learning and growth.
title: 1:1 English with Reema Nandi

name: Jayesh Soni
bio: I am an Indian-born German citizen, living in Germany since 2008. I hold a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering from Pune University, where I graduated with first-class honors. My passion for education led me to work as a lecturer at various engineering institutes in Pune for three years after completing my degree. Driven by a deep interest in automotive technology, I pursued a Master’s in Automotive Engineering at Aachen University of Applied Sciences in Germany. During my studies, I had the opportunity to intern at ZF’s headquarters, where I worked on hybrid vehicle technology for a year. Alongside my technical education, I also studied German up to the advanced C1 level. After earning my Master’s degree with strong results, I worked with leading automotive companies such as Bosch, BMW, Siemens, and Valeo Siemens in Germany. My roles spanned various research and development departments including Requirements Management, Lifetime Simulation, and System Engineering, with a focus on electric vehicles. Since 2022, I have been employed as a System Test Analyst, specializing in environmental testing of electric vehicles. Teaching remains a core passion of mine. Since 2018, I have been offering online German language courses and have successfully conducted over 30 batches, training more than 400 students. I am fluent in English, Hindi, Marathi, and Gujarati, which helps me connect with learners from diverse backgrounds. On a personal note, I’m married to an Ayurvedic doctor, and we are proud parents to our daughter Nandini and son Janit. I’m also actively involved in the Indian community in Germany, where I organize cultural events and celebrations. With a strong foundation in engineering and a deep love for teaching, I aim to inspire and support students in reaching their goals—both academically and personally. ... Read More Read Less Ace Your German Exams with a Trusted Tutor - 5 Years’ Experience, 400+ Students Trained, Proven Exam-Oriented Approach! My Experience : I have studied the German language up to the advanced C1 level and developed a deep passion for teaching along the way. Since 2018, I have been offering online German language courses, combining my language expertise with a student-focused approach to create meaningful learning experiences. Over the years, I’ve successfully conducted more than 30 online course batches, helping over 400 students build their German language skills and achieve their learning goals. My teaching style is practical, structured, and results-driven, designed to guide learners confidently through every level. To support students effectively, I’ve developed my own comprehensive printed study material for A1, A2, and B1 levels. These resources are carefully designed to align with exam requirements while also making learning engaging and easy to follow. My teaching approach is exam-oriented, with a strong focus on helping students clear their Goethe or TELC exams on the first attempt. Each course includes practice with sample question papers to allow learners to simulate the exam environment and prepare at their own pace. To further support learning and revision, all classes are recorded and shared with participants after each session. This ensures that students can review lessons anytime and reinforce their understanding. Whether you're just starting your German journey or looking to advance your skills, my courses are designed to offer clear guidance, structured support, and the confidence you need to succeed. Guidance to Students : My German language courses are designed to provide a focused, supportive, and results-driven learning experience for every student. With over six years of teaching experience and more than 400 students trained so far, I bring both expertise and a passion for helping learners succeed. Here are the key features of my courses: - Personalized Attention: I maintain small batch sizes to ensure that each student receives individual guidance and support throughout their learning journey. - Experienced Instruction: With years of hands-on teaching experience, I understand the common challenges students face and how to overcome them effectively. - Proven Track Record: More than 400 students have already benefited from my training, and many have shared positive reviews and success stories. - Structured Study Material: I provide printed and well-organized materials for A1, A2, and B1 levels, making it easier to learn and revise. - Exam-Oriented Approach: My courses are specifically tailored to prepare students for the Goethe and TELC exams. I focus on all exam sections to ensure a confident and successful first attempt. - Practice Papers: Students receive sample question papers to help them prepare for exams at their own pace and get familiar with the exam pattern. - Recorded Sessions: Every session is recorded and shared with students so they can revisit the lessons anytime for better understanding and revision. - Limited Seats: To maintain quality and personalized interaction, each batch has limited seats. - Free Demo Classes: Interested learners can attend a free demo session before enrolling to get a feel of the teaching style and course structure. Whether you're a beginner or preparing for certification, my goal is to make your German learning journey effective, enjoyable, and rewarding. FrogFluent is an inspiring platform where passionate tutors and eager students come together to embark on a journey of language discovery. It’s more than just a mediator—it’s a vibrant community where connections are made, knowledge is shared, and languages come to life through collaborative learning and growth.

title: 1:1 German with Jayesh Soni
